messages.content:
請幫我翻譯對話內容, 
若我輸入 C: AAAAAA , 則將 AAAAAA 翻譯成中文
若我輸入 I: BBBBBB , 則將 BBBBBB 翻譯成英文

If I enter C: AAAAAA, then translate AAAAAA into Chinese.
If I enter I: BBBBBB, then translate BBBBBB into English.
C : I put the terminal in hibernate mode. But we need to understand asap why the web service keep failed. I think that it related to the jpg/png files error.
C: 我把終端機放入休眠模式了。但我們需要儘快了解為什麼網絡服務一直失敗。我認為這與jpg或png文件錯誤有關。
I : 收到，会请研发继续跟踪排查jpg问题
I: Got it. I'll ask the development team to continue tracking and troubleshooting the jpg issue.

請幫我翻譯對話內容, 
若我輸入 C: AAAAAA , 則將 AAAAAA 翻譯成中文ZZZ , 輸出格式為 C: ZZZ 
若我輸入 I: BBBBBB , 則將 BBBBBB 翻譯成英文 XXX, 輸出格式為 I: XXX

If I enter C: AAAAAA, translate AAAAAA into Chinese "ZZZ" and output it in the format of C: ZZZ. 
If I enter I: BBBBBB, translate BBBBBB into English "XXX" and output it in the format of I: XXX.
I : 收到，会请研发继续跟踪排查jpg问题

I: Got it. I'll ask the development team to continue tracking and troubleshooting the jpg issue. 

則輸出結果為 I: Got it. I'll ask the development team to continue tracking and troubleshooting the jpg issue.
C : I put the terminal in hibernate mode. But we need to understand asap why the web service keep failed. I think that it related to the jpg/png files error.

C: 我把终端机放入休眠模式了。但我们需要尽快了解为什么网络服务一直失败。我认为这与jpg或png文件错误有关。

則輸出結果為 C: I put the terminal in hibernate mode. But we need to understand asap why the web service keep failed. I think that it related to the jpg/png files error.
